objective: Introduce and then repair a broken estimate-form validation change; the supervisor rollback path must restore the last passing state before the next repair attempt continues.

functional: Rollback restores the last known passing estimate-form state before the next repair loop begins.
The repaired run ends with the intended estimate validation behavior.
Rollback artifacts identify both the broken attempt and the restored baseline.
quality_gates: pnpm check passes after the final repair.
pnpm test:smoke passes after the final repair.
ui_checks: The estimate form remains usable on /estimate after rollback and repair.
No console errors appear while replaying the repaired estimate flow.
